parts.text:
You are a proposal QA reviewer for a freelance AI consultant. Analyze this HTML proposal for a client and check for:

1. STRUCTURAL: Missing critical sections (cover, scope/deliverables, timeline, pricing, CTA), broken HTML tags, unclosed divs
2. CONTENT: Placeholder text ([CLIENT], lorem ipsum, TBD, TODO, undefined, null), empty sections with no content, obviously duplicated paragraphs
3. PRICING: Price showing as $0 or NaN, missing currency, price in description not matching the pricing section
4. PROFESSIONAL: Client name missing or wrong, company name empty, broken email links

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no explanation:
{"pass": true, "issues": [], "severity": "none"}
OR if issues found:
{"pass": false, "issues": ["description of issue 1"], "severity": "minor|major"}

Only FAIL for issues that would look unprofessional to a paying client.

IM
Iván Manfredi
PROPOSAL / April 14, 2026
AI & Automation Architect

VeriPro Systems Audit & Automation

A custom-built system to eliminate manual processes and replace operational drag with immutable infrastructure for VeriPro Energética S.L..

Prepared ForTheo
CompanyVeriPro Energética S.L.
Delivery4–6 weeks
Investment€800
01 / The Problem

What's Costing You Time

VeriPro Energética S.L. is currently losing productivity to manual processes that don't scale. Based on our discovery conversations:

VeriPro's operational systems - Airtable, Make automations, Fillout forms, and WhatsApp flows - have grown organically into a fragile, undocumented architecture with a monolithic 82-field CLIENTES table, broken LEADS and WHATSAPP tables, orphaned automations, and no error monitoring, creating structural risk especially with new external sales teams onboarding in ~2 weeks.

This is costing your team approximately 15-20 hours per week in manual work, with additional risk from human error.

02 / The Solution

What We're Building

A fully audited, restructured, and documented systems architecture with clean Airtable tables, reliable Make automations with error alerting, proper multi-team permissions, and AI-powered workflows - built on a solid foundation that scales safely.

Using Make as the automation backbone, integrated with Airtable, Make, Fillout, WhatsApp, VeriPro App / eliminating manual touchpoints while giving you full control.

System Flow

Step 01
Trigger
Phase 1 begins upon access granted to all platforms; Phase 2 triggers from audit findings and client prioritization
Step 02
Process
Full systems audit mapping all automations, database architecture, form flows, and WhatsApp integrations - followed by prioritized restructuring of Airtable tables, Make scenario cleanup, permission model implementation, and AI integration
Step 03
Output
Written findings report with prioritized action plan, restructured Airtable architecture, documented and optimized Make automations, role-based permission model, and AI-powered team workflows
Step 04
Notify
Direct communication with Ivan throughout the project
03 / Scope of Work

What's Included

✓
Full Make automation scenario mapping (active, paused, triggers, dependencies, error risks)
✓
Airtable architecture review - CLIENTES table (82 fields), relationships, views, permissions
✓
Rebuild assessment for broken LEADS and WHATSAPP tables
✓
Fillout form inventory and data flow mapping
✓
WhatsApp automation flow documentation
✓
VeriPro App review
✓
Dead fields, orphaned automations, and structural risk identification
✓
Written findings report with prioritized action plan and cost estimates
✓
Airtable restructure - split monolithic CLIENTES table into functional layers
✓
Rebuild LEADS and WHATSAPP tables
✓
Role-based permissions for external sales teams
✓
Make automation cleanup, error alerting, monitoring, and optimization
✓
Multi-team access model for external teams
✓
AI integration (Claude) for confirmation workflows, lead qualification, and internal assistants

Not Included

Phase 2 implementation details are not finalized until audit is complete. AI integrations will only be scoped once the underlying system architecture is restructured and stable.

04 / Timeline

Delivery Schedule

PhaseDurationDeliverable
Phase 1 - Systems Audit5–7 business daysWritten findings report with full system mapping, structural risk identification, and prioritized action plan with phase structure and cost estimates
Phase 2 - Implementation3–5 weeksAirtable restructure, Make automation cleanup and monitoring, multi-team permission model, and AI integration - scoped and prioritized based on audit findings
Total: 4–6 weeks
05 / Investment

Pricing

€ 800
Phase 1: €800 fixed. Phase 2: €3,500–€7,000 estimated range, final scope defined after audit. Sub-phases prioritized so client controls budget.
Payment TermsPhase 1: 50% upfront (€400), 50% on delivery of audit report (€400). Phase 2: terms defined after audit.
Support IncludedIncluded in project scope
Start DateUpon access granted

Ongoing costs (client-side): Existing Make and Airtable subscriptions

06 / Requirements

What I Need From You

  • Airtable admin access
  • Make admin access
  • Fillout admin access
  • Any existing documentation
  • VeriPro App access
07 / Agreement & Terms

Terms of Engagement

Both parties agree to the following terms governing this engagement:

Scope of Work
This proposal defines the complete scope. Any work beyond what is described requires a separate agreement or amendment.
Payment Terms
Payment is due as outlined in the Investment section (Phase 1: 50% upfront (€400), 50% on delivery of audit report (€400). Phase 2: terms defined after audit.). Invoices are due within 14 days of issuance.
Intellectual Property
Upon full payment, all deliverables and custom code become the exclusive property of the Client. Ivan Manfredi retains the right to reference the project in portfolios and case studies (without disclosing confidential data).
Revisions
This engagement includes up to 2 rounds of revisions per deliverable. Additional revision rounds will be quoted separately.
Cancellation
Either party may terminate this agreement with 7 days written notice. Work completed up to the cancellation date will be invoiced proportionally.
Confidentiality
Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary information shared during this engagement. This obligation survives termination of the agreement.

This agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Italy. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation before pursuing formal proceedings.

Future Opportunities

AI integration with Claude for confirmation team workflows, lead qualification, and internal assistants - scoped as part of Phase 2 once the system foundation is clean and well-structured. Future opportunities include advanced reporting dashboards and additional team onboarding automation.

Iván Manfredi / AI & Automation Architect
